'''Tri'byia''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who served as the Field Controller of the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] on [[Drev'starn]], the capital city of the planet [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. Tri'byia led [[Drend Navett]] into the shield generator complex after Navett was hired to use [[cordioline trehansicol]] to exterminate [[metalmite]]s in that area. However, Tri'byia did not know that Navett had a secret plan to sabotage the shield generator. Tri'byia didn't realize that Navett was spraying liquid nutrients around the shield generator in addition to cordioline trhansicol. Later, Navett released hungry [[mawkren]]s with explosives tied to their backs near the shield generator. The mawkrens ran towards the liquid nutrients, and then exploded, destroying the shield generator.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
